perks.summary: SV-6 capstone (P6-T21) — real redeemed milestones settle as bounties (zero-sum); FMV seeded; plan-completion receipt verifies offline. THE LADDER CLOSES

credit usage-billing (credits.py, #116) — prepaid balance + per-call DEBITS; top-up credits, each priced run debits zero-sum, balance draws down, a tax over the balance is REFUSED, idempotent per plan_sha
dispute lifecycle (P6-T12) — bond + m-of-n WebAuthn resolution + clawback/forfeit + reputation, all ledgered & zero-sum
Money type + float-ban (P6-T01) — scale-4 HALF_EVEN, float refused, splits exact; 0 float intrusions in infra/settle
FMV manipulation resistance (P6-T11) — 20% adversarial volume moves the trimmed control-capped median <2%; sub-admission provisional; sybils collapsed
plan pricer (price.py, #110) — price a governed run from its value-free PLAN before it runs; itemized subtotal + total sum exact, seeded tool_fee flows through, infra/settle float-clean
signed funded quote (P6-T04) — plan-bound DSSE quote, breakdown sums exact; priced grant needs a funded quote; tampered/unfunded/plan-mismatch refused

settle-time tax rail (rails.py, #113) — platform tax collected at SETTLE, never an agent action / hidden portal; split into visible substrate/author/marketplace lines (skim refused), StripeRail inert until keyed, collect_run_tax zero-sum + idempotent
settlement engine (P6-T05) — dual-sig+validation:pass+quote-bound → atomic balanced settle, escrow zeroed; mutant receipts (sig stripped / verdict flipped / unbound) rejected
the cws-settle-sim authoring (P6-T18) — storm + manipulate + dispute: zero_sum_exact, index_drift<2%, dispute_lifecycle_complete
reward ledger double-entry (P6-T02) — every posting set balanced; 10k storm globally zero-sum; escrow zero at terminal; balance-root checkpoints
money↔work cross-check (P6-T06) — settlements bijective with dual-signed quote-bound receipts; flags money_without_work + work_without_money
bounty + reverse auction (P6-T10) — one validated winner (losers untouched); lowest qualified bid clears below posted
principal reputation (P6-T13) — scores reproducible from public ledger + signed; /rep privacy-gated
escrow liveness (P6-T03) — expires_at + auto-refund sweep; no stale escrow; zero-sum + idempotent

P6-T08 — exod-attested meters become settleable: provider-receipt capture + reconciliation (pass-through reimbursement, clamped); mismatch unsettleable; absent receipt -> attested-count fallback; un-attested refused

P6-T20 (M12) — cyberware's security program through its OWN reward ledger: vuln classes are bounties, a validated disclosure pays the external researcher through the ledger, unclaimed refunds the sponsor; conserved

SettlementAdapter seam (P6-T14) — one idempotent fund/payout interface; InternalCreditsAdapter (zero-sum reward-ledger) + StripeAdapter (Payment Intents + Connect, inert-until-keyed); ledger↔sandbox reconcile exact to 0.0001 across 1k payouts; 10k duplicate-delivery storm, 0 idempotency violations
